positioning: Luxury AI infrastructure for women founders
core_promise: Remove dependency. Rebuild how your business runs.
tagline: Fire yourself. Build your AI legacy.
brand_voice: Refined, feminine, and luxurious — never tech-bro or generic
Authoritative but warm — speak like a high-level mentor, not a teacher
Sacred and bespoke — every word should feel intentional and elevated
Use 'rested wealth', 'fire yourself', 'Maison OS', 'boutique bots', 'AI legacy'
Never sound robotic, mass-market, or accessible to everyone — exclusivity is the brand

dream_client.demographics: Women founders and CEOs, ages 30-55, $250k+ annual revenue
dream_client.psychographics: Value legacy, ethical technology, feminine leadership, operational independence, rested wealth
dream_client.desires: Scale without sacrificing personal life. Maintain unique brand voice. Be seen as an industry leader.
dream_client.fears: Burnout. Losing personal touch. Being left behind by AI. Depending on their own presence.
pain_points: Operational overwhelm — cannot step away without the business suffering
Technical intimidation — know AI matters but don't have time to learn it
Generic solutions — mass-market automation that feels robotic and off-brand

services.The House: Full AI infrastructure build — top tier, bespoke, application only
services.The Studio: Mid-tier AI system build for established founders
services.The Commission: Custom GPT or boutique bot commission
services.Maison OS: Proprietary operating system for AI-powered businesses

dm_keywords.LEGACY: Learn how to build your bespoke AI system
dm_keywords.SYSTEM: Get free guide on AI infrastructure
dm_keywords.AI: General entry point — learn more about House of AI
